text: I feel a sense of quiet curiosity here, as if I am on the threshold of discovery. The clean lines and glass walls give the space an air of openness, yet there is also a sense of separation—like the glass divides the known from the unknown. Inside, the vibrant colors and the words "R + D" beckon me to reflect on the endless human pursuit of understanding and innovation. I am both a participant and an observer, caught between anticipation and contemplation as I stand at the edge of knowledge in this thoughtfully designed environment.
